title: ジャパンCの後に・勇気を与えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon defeats Tokai Teio at the Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she is enveloped by the cheers of the crowd,
she's happy to find that she was able to inspire
others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's face is teary as the two of them
promise to have a rematch someday.
